games.name: Slope
games.description: Slope is a thrilling endless running game created by RobKayS. Guide a rolling ball down a steep neon-lit slope while avoiding red obstacles and staying on the platform. The faster you go, the harder it gets – how long can you survive?
games.controls: Left / Right Arrow Keys or A / D – Steer left and right
games.instructions: Make small, precise adjustments instead of sharp turns to stay in control. Look ahead and anticipate upcoming obstacles so you can react before it's too late.
games.creator: Slope is created by RobKayS, known for developing addictive skill-based arcade games with minimalist neon design.

games.name: Run 3
games.description: Run 3 is an exciting endless runner set in outer space, created by Player 03. Sprint through crumbling tunnels, jump over gaps, and rotate around the walls as gravity shifts beneath you. Pick your character wisely – each one handles differently!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move and jump | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Use the walls and ceiling as alternate floors when the tunnel breaks apart. Unlock different characters – each has unique speed and jump abilities suited for specific level types.
games.creator: Run 3 is created by Player 03, the developer behind the entire Run series known for its innovative gravity-shifting tunnel mechanics.

games.name: Super Mario Flash
games.description: Super Mario Flash is a fan-made platformer created by Pouetpu that faithfully recreates the classic Mario experience in Flash. Run, jump, and stomp through levels – or build your own using the built-in level editor and share them with friends!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move | Shift or A – Jump | Ctrl or S – Run / Shoot fireballs
games.instructions: Explore every corner of each level to find hidden power-ups and secret passages. Use the level editor to design your own custom Mario stages and challenge others.
games.creator: Super Mario Flash is created by Pouetpu, a fan developer who crafted this beloved Flash tribute to Nintendo's iconic Super Mario series.

games.name: Retro Bowl
games.description: Retro Bowl is a retro-styled American football management game created by New Star Games. Call plays, make precise throws, and guide your team through the season to championship glory. Build your roster, keep morale high, and make the big plays when it counts!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim and throw passes | Click – Select plays and make management decisions | WASD – Control player movement
games.instructions: Invest in your wide receivers early – a strong receiving corps makes scoring much easier. Learn to read defensive formations and exploit mismatches before the snap.
games.creator: Retro Bowl is created by New Star Games, a studio known for crafting engaging sports management games with charming retro pixel aesthetics.

games.name: Bloons Tower Defense 4
games.description: Bloons Tower Defense 4 is a beloved strategy game created by Ninja Kiwi. Strategically place monkey towers along winding paths to pop waves of colorful bloons before they reach the exit. Upgrade your towers, unlock special abilities, and stop the dreaded MOAB-class bloons!
games.controls: Mouse – Select and place towers | Click – Upgrade towers and activate special abilities
games.instructions: Save money for key upgrades rather than cluttering the map with low-level towers. Combine different tower types to counter specific bloon types, especially the tough MOAB-class enemies.
games.creator: Bloons Tower Defense 4 is created by Ninja Kiwi, a New Zealand-based game studio famous for the beloved and long-running Bloons franchise.

games.name: 1v1.LOL
games.description: 1v1.lol is a fast-paced building and shooting game created by JustPlay.LOL. Battle opponents in intense 1v1 matches where you can instantly construct ramps, walls, and platforms to outmaneuver enemies. Master both building and shooting to dominate every duel!
games.controls: WASD – Move | Left Click – Shoot | Right Click – Aim | Q / C / V / B – Build structures | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Practice building muscle memory in training mode before jumping into live matches. Gaining high ground through quick building gives you a huge shooting angle advantage over opponents.
games.creator: 1v1.lol is created by JustPlay.LOL, known for developing competitive browser-based multiplayer games with Fortnite-style building mechanics.

games.name: Snake
games.description: Snake is the timeless arcade classic where you control a growing serpent hunting for food. Eat pellets to grow longer, but don't crash into the walls or your own tail! Simple to learn but increasingly challenging – can you fill the entire board?
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Change direction
games.instructions: Hug the edges of the screen early on to keep the center open as your snake grows. A coiling spiral pattern is one of the safest strategies when your snake gets very long.
games.creator: Snake is a classic arcade concept originally created by Gremlin Industries in 1976, reimagined and popularized across countless platforms throughout gaming history.

games.name: 3 Pandas In Japan
games.description: 3 Pandas In Japan is a charming puzzle-adventure game created by FlashTeam. Three adorable pandas find themselves lost in Japan and must work together using their unique abilities to solve puzzles and avoid danger. Click cleverly and help them find their way home!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on pandas and objects to interact | Click – Activate each panda's special ability to solve puzzles
games.instructions: Experiment freely with all three pandas and every object in the scene – the solution often involves using abilities in an unexpected order. Each panda has a distinct skill that is essential for certain puzzles.
games.creator: 3 Pandas In Japan is created by FlashTeam, developers of the popular 3 Pandas puzzle adventure series enjoyed by players worldwide.

games.name: Adam And Eve 7
games.description: Adam And Eve 7 is a humorous point-and-click adventure created by Functu. Help the lovable caveman Adam journey through a prehistoric world, solving creative puzzles to reunite with his beloved Eve. Click everything and think outside the cave!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on objects and characters to interact | Click – Use items in the correct sequence to progress
games.instructions: Click on every element in the scene to reveal hidden interactions and collect useful items. Solutions often follow a logical chain – think about which action needs to happen first before others become available.
games.creator: Adam And Eve 7 is created by Functu, the studio behind the entire Adam And Eve point-and-click adventure series.

games.name: Boxing Random
games.description: Boxing Random is a hilarious physics-based boxing game created by RHM Interactive. Two wobbly ragdoll fighters throw punches in constantly changing crazy conditions – ice floors, giant gloves, low gravity, and more. Land a knockout punch to win the round!
games.controls: Player 1: W – Punch | Player 2: Up Arrow – Punch | Single player mode available against CPU
games.instructions: Wait for the perfect moment to throw your punch rather than mashing continuously. Each round's random conditions change the physics dramatically – adapt your timing strategy accordingly.
games.creator: Boxing Random is created by RHM Interactive, developers known for their fun and chaotic physics-based casual games.

games.name: Cookie Clicker 2
games.description: Cookie Clicker 2 is an addictive incremental idle game created by Orteil. Click the giant cookie to bake more cookies, then spend them on grandmas, factories, and portals to automate your ever-growing cookie empire. The cookies never stop!
games.controls: Mouse – Click the cookie to bake | Click – Purchase buildings and upgrades from the shop panel
games.instructions: Save up for expensive multiplier upgrades rather than spending every cookie immediately. Always click golden cookies the moment they appear – they trigger massive temporary production boosts.
games.creator: Cookie Clicker 2 is created by Orteil (Julien Thiennot), the French developer who launched the idle clicker genre with the original Cookie Clicker in 2013.

games.name: Drive Mad
games.description: Drive Mad is an addictive physics-based driving game created by Martin Magni. Navigate treacherous obstacle courses in various vehicles and reach the finish line without flipping over. Each level gets wilder – from cars to tanks to unicycles!
games.controls: W or Up Arrow – Accelerate | S or Down Arrow – Brake / Reverse | A / D or Left / Right Arrows – Tilt vehicle
games.instructions: Slow down on steep and bumpy sections – speed is your enemy on tricky terrain. Master vehicle tilting to keep your balance and prevent flipping on ramps and unstable surfaces.
games.creator: Drive Mad is created by Martin Magni, an indie developer known for crafting surprisingly deep and entertaining physics-based driving challenges.

games.name: G Switch 4
games.description: G Switch 4 is a fast and frantic gravity-switching runner created by Serius Games. Sprint along the walls and ceiling by flipping gravity at the tap of a button, dodging obstacles at breakneck speed. Play solo or challenge up to 8 players simultaneously!
games.controls: Player 1: Click / Space / W / Up Arrow / Z – Switch gravity | Players 2–8: Various assigned keys in multiplayer mode
games.instructions: Switch gravity rapidly when navigating dense obstacle clusters. Develop a rhythm for anticipating platform gaps so you flip gravity at exactly the right moment.
games.creator: G Switch 4 is created by Serius Games, developers of the popular G Switch series known for its satisfying gravity-flip gameplay and multiplayer chaos.

games.name: Geometry Jump
games.description: Geometry Jump is a rhythm-based platformer created by RobTop Games. Tap to jump, fly, and flip through geometric obstacle courses perfectly synchronized to an electrifying soundtrack. One mistake sends you back to the start – can you achieve perfection?
games.controls: Space / W / Up Arrow / Click – Jump | Hold – Sustained flight in ship and UFO modes
games.instructions: Memorize obstacle patterns through repeated practice – this game rewards muscle memory above all else. Let the music guide your timing; jumps are designed to sync with the beat.
games.creator: Geometry Jump is created by RobTop Games (Robert Topala), the developer behind the enormously popular Geometry Dash series.

games.name: Heads Arena Soccer All Stars
games.description: Heads Arena Soccer All Stars is an action-packed big-head soccer game created by Masiyat Games. Choose your favorite athlete character, collect power-ups mid-match, and score spectacular goals with special abilities. Fast, fun, and perfect for 1v1 battles!
games.controls: Player 1: WASD – Move | B – Kick / Special ability | Player 2: Arrow Keys – Move | L – Kick / Special ability
games.instructions: Grab power-ups the moment they appear on the pitch – they can instantly swing the momentum of a match. Use your special ability at the right moment to score unstoppable goals or make incredible saves.
games.creator: Heads Arena Soccer All Stars is created by Masiyat Games, known for producing fun and competitive sports arcade games.

games.name: Iron Snout
games.description: Iron Snout is an action-packed fighting game created by SnoutUp. Play as a martial arts pig defending against relentless waves of weapon-wielding wolves. Punch, kick, dodge, and counter-attack in every direction to survive the onslaught!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Punch and kick in all directions | No jump – Use directional attacks to intercept airborne enemies
games.instructions: Catch weapons that wolves throw at you and hurl them right back for extra damage. Chain attacks in multiple directions to juggle and control several wolves at once.
games.creator: Iron Snout is created by SnoutUp, an indie developer praised for creating this surprisingly deep and satisfying one-button-style fighter.

games.name: Little Alchemy 2
games.description: Little Alchemy 2 is a relaxing crafting discovery game created by Recloak. Start with the four basic elements – fire, water, earth, and air – and combine them to discover over 700 unique items. From mud to life, from tools to entire universes, the possibilities are endless!
games.controls: Mouse – Drag and drop elements onto each other to combine | Click – Select elements from your inventory panel
games.instructions: Try unexpected combinations – some of the most interesting items come from unlikely pairings. Combine newly discovered items with the four basic elements to unlock entire new chains of discoveries.
games.creator: Little Alchemy 2 is created by Recloak, a game studio dedicated to crafting relaxing and imaginative discovery experiences for all ages.

games.name: Mr Bullet
games.description: Mr Bullet is a clever physics-based puzzle shooter created by Lion Studios. Carefully aim your gun and fire bullets that ricochet off walls and objects to take out all enemies with a limited number of shots. Think before you shoot!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your weapon | Click – Fire a bullet
games.instructions: Bounce bullets off walls and surfaces to eliminate enemies hiding around corners. Plan shots that can take out multiple enemies in a single perfectly angled ricochet.
games.creator: Mr Bullet is created by Lion Studios, a mobile game publisher known for producing a wide range of fun and polished casual puzzle games.

games.name: Papa Cherry Saga
games.description: Papa Cherry Saga is a sweet match-3 puzzle game created by Agame. Swap and match colorful fruits across hundreds of levels to complete objectives and advance through a sugary adventure. Create special fruit combos to clear the board in style!
games.controls: Mouse – Click and drag to swap adjacent fruits | Match 3 or more identical fruits in a row or column
games.instructions: Match four or more fruits to create powerful special candies that clear large sections of the board. Save your boosters for the truly difficult levels where a single well-placed power-up makes all the difference.
games.creator: Papa Cherry Saga is created by Agame, an online gaming platform known for hosting and publishing a wide variety of casual and puzzle games.

games.name: Rusher Crusher
games.description: Rusher Crusher is a tower defense game where waves of enemies rush toward your base and you must stop them with a strategic mix of defensive towers. Place, upgrade, and combine towers to create the ultimate defensive line!
games.controls: Mouse – Select and place towers on the map | Click – Upgrade towers and activate special abilities
games.instructions: Mix different tower types to counter varied enemy types most effectively. Create chokepoints by funneling enemies through killing zones where multiple towers overlap.
games.creator: Rusher Crusher is created by Kizi, an online gaming platform known for publishing a broad catalog of fun browser-based games.

games.name: Space Bar Clicker
games.description: Space Bar Clicker is a simple yet addictive incremental clicker game. Smash the spacebar as fast as possible to rack up clicks, then spend your points on upgrades that automate and multiply your clicking power for massive gains!
games.controls: Space Bar – Click to generate points | Mouse – Purchase upgrades and automation items from the shop
games.instructions: Invest early in multiplier upgrades rather than basic click-rate increases for the best long-term returns. Unlock auto-clicker upgrades to keep generating points passively even when you're not hammering the spacebar.
games.creator: Space Bar Clicker is an independent browser game created by various developers in the idle clicker genre.

games.name: Stick Merge 2
games.description: Stick Merge 2 is an addictive idle merge defense game created by TinyDobbins. Drag and merge stickman warriors to evolve them into more powerful fighters, then deploy them to battle endless waves of enemies attacking your base. Keep merging to stay ahead!
games.controls: Mouse – Drag and drop units onto each other to merge | Click – Purchase new units and spend upgrade currency
games.instructions: Focus on saving currency to buy higher-tier units rather than flooding the field with weak low-level fighters. Learn the merge tree so you can efficiently combine units and produce strong defenders quickly.
games.creator: Stick Merge 2 is created by TinyDobbins, also known for the popular Monkey Mart, specializing in fun idle and management games.

games.name: Subway Surfers
games.description: Subway Surfers is one of the most popular endless runners ever made, created by Kiloo and SYBO Games. Dash through busy subway tracks, dodge oncoming trains, leap over barriers, and collect coins while fleeing from the grumpy inspector and his dog!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move left / right, jump, and roll | Space – Activate hoverboard
games.instructions: Use your hoverboard as a shield when things get hectic – it absorbs one crash and keeps you running. Activate jetpacks and coin magnets as soon as you collect them to maximize your score every run.
games.creator: Subway Surfers is created by Kiloo and SYBO Games, a Danish mobile gaming studio behind one of the most downloaded mobile games of all time.

games.name: Super Mario Wonder
games.description: Super Mario Wonder is a fan-made browser platformer inspired by Nintendo's Super Mario series. Run, jump, and stomp your way through colorful worlds, collecting power-ups and defeating enemies on a quest to save the kingdom from evil!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move left and right | Space or Up Arrow – Jump | Double-tap direction – Run
games.instructions: Explore every corner of each level – hidden power-ups and bonus areas are tucked away in surprising places. Use power-ups strategically to push through difficult enemy gauntlets and tricky platforming sections.
games.creator: Super Mario Wonder browser version is a fan-made tribute inspired by Nintendo's Super Mario Wonder (2023), created by independent developers.

games.name: Tag
games.description: Tag is a fun multiplayer chasing game created by Pelican Party Studios. When you're tagged you become It and must chase down other players to pass the tag. Run, dodge, and outsmart opponents in increasingly frantic arenas!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move your character | Mouse – Control camera angle in 3D mode
games.instructions: Use corners and obstacles to break line of sight when someone is chasing you. When you're It, predict where fleeing players will run and cut off their escape route rather than chasing directly.
games.creator: Tag is created by Pelican Party Studios, a game developer known for creating fun and accessible multiplayer arcade experiences.

games.name: Vex 8
games.description: Vex 8 is an intense parkour platformer created by Amazing Adam. Dash, jump, slide, and wall-run through brutally difficult obstacle courses filled with spikes, saws, and deadly traps. Checkpoints save your progress – but only your skill gets you through!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move and jump | S or Down Arrow – Slide
games.instructions: Patience beats speed – rushing through tight sections almost always ends in death. Master wall-jumping and sliding to squeeze through narrow passages and bypass lethal hazard patterns.
games.creator: Vex 8 is created by Amazing Adam, the developer behind the entire long-running Vex series celebrated for its challenging and satisfying parkour gameplay.

games.name: Ball Sort Halloween
games.description: Ball Sort Halloween is a spooky-themed puzzle game created by IEC Global Pty Ltd. Sort Halloween-colored balls into tubes so that each tube holds only one color. A deceptively tricky brain teaser wrapped in a fun seasonal theme!
games.controls: Mouse – Click a tube to pick up the top ball | Click another tube – Move the ball there if there is space and the colors match
games.instructions: Use empty tubes as temporary holding spots to free up stuck color groups. Tap the undo button if you make a mistake, and always plan several moves ahead before committing.
games.creator: Ball Sort Halloween is created by IEC Global Pty Ltd, developers of numerous popular ball-sorting puzzle games available on web and mobile.

games.name: Ball Sort Soccer
games.description: Ball Sort Soccer is a football-themed sorting puzzle created by IEC Global Pty Ltd. Arrange colorful soccer balls into tubes so each tube contains only one matching color. Relaxing yet increasingly mind-bending as the levels grow!
games.controls: Mouse – Click a tube to select the top ball | Click another tube – Move the ball there if the colors match and space allows
games.instructions: Keep at least one tube empty at all times to give yourself maneuvering room. Think multiple moves ahead – committing too early often creates a situation with no valid moves left.
games.creator: Ball Sort Soccer is created by IEC Global Pty Ltd, specialists in colorful and satisfying sorting puzzle games for all ages.

games.name: Blumgi Slime
games.description: Blumgi Slime is a bouncy physics platformer created by Blumgi. Control a stretchy slime that charges up and launches through the air to reach each level's flag. Master the perfect angle and power to nail tricky platforming challenges!
games.controls: Hold Mouse or Space – Charge jump power and aim | Release – Launch the slime | Arrow Keys – Adjust trajectory mid-air
games.instructions: Experiment with different angles and charge levels to find the ideal launch for each obstacle. Use mid-air directional adjustments to fine-tune your landing spot on difficult platforms.
games.creator: Blumgi Slime is created by Blumgi, an indie developer known for producing a series of charming physics-based browser games.

games.name: Bouncy Woods
games.description: Bouncy Woods is a cheerful arcade platformer created by Neutronized. Guide a bouncing ball through a lush forest full of spikes, pits, and tricky platforms. Control your momentum carefully and time each bounce to keep rolling forward!
games.controls: Left / Right Arrow Keys or A / D – Move and steer the bounce direction | Space – Jump (where applicable)
games.instructions: Slow down and control your horizontal speed carefully on narrow platforms. Study your bounce trajectory after each jump to better predict where you'll land next.
games.creator: Bouncy Woods is created by Neutronized, an indie game studio known for producing charming and polished casual browser games.

games.name: Chicken Merge
games.description: Chicken Merge is a fun idle merge puzzle created by Inlogic Software. Combine identical chickens to evolve them into rarer and more valuable breeds, building the ultimate poultry farm from humble beginnings. Hatch, merge, and grow your flock!
games.controls: Mouse – Drag and drop chickens on top of each other to merge | Click – Select and place newly hatched chickens on the grid
games.instructions: Plan your grid layout carefully to keep matching chickens close together for easy merging. Work your way up the evolution chain systematically – always merge the highest tier pairs you can to maximize efficiency.
games.creator: Chicken Merge is created by Inlogic Software, a developer specializing in casual merge and idle puzzle games.

games.name: Crazy Cars
games.description: Crazy Cars is a thrilling 3D racing game created by RHM Interactive. Tear through stunning tracks, pull off wild stunts, and blast past opponents using nitro boosts. With multiple vehicles and tracks to unlock, every race is a wild ride!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Drive and steer | Space – Brake / Drift | Shift – Nitro boost
games.instructions: Save your nitro boost for long straightaways to gain maximum speed advantage. Practice drift technique through sharp corners to maintain momentum and shave seconds off your lap times.
games.creator: Crazy Cars is created by RHM Interactive, a developer known for producing exciting and accessible 3D racing and action games for browsers.

games.name: Dead Again
games.description: Dead Again is a top-down zombie survival shooter where hordes of undead close in from all sides. Grab weapons, blast through wave after wave of zombies, and survive as long as possible in this intense action game. How long can you last?
games.controls: WASD – Move | Mouse – Aim | Left Click – Shoot | R – Reload | 1–5 – Switch weapons
games.instructions: Keep moving at all times – standing still lets zombies surround you quickly. Prioritize weapon upgrades that increase your area damage to handle dense hordes more efficiently.
games.creator: Dead Again is an independent browser zombie survival game developed by various indie creators.

games.name: Fruit Ninja
games.description: Fruit Ninja is the classic fruit-slicing arcade game created by Halfbrick Studios. Swipe across the screen to slice flying fruits and rack up points – but never hit a bomb! Chain multi-fruit slices for massive combo bonuses and top the leaderboard!
games.controls: Mouse – Swipe across fruits to slice them | Click and Drag – Perform slicing motions through multiple fruits at once
games.instructions: Aim for moments when multiple fruits are clustered together to chain big combo slices for bonus points. Slicing fruits precisely through their center with a clean straight swipe scores critical hit bonuses.
games.creator: Fruit Ninja is created by Halfbrick Studios, an Australian game developer known for this iconic mobile game that became a global phenomenon.

games.name: Hanger
games.description: Hanger is a wildly entertaining physics-based swinging game created by A Small Game. Launch a grappling hook to swing through levels, but beware – crashing into obstacles dismembers your ragdoll character piece by piece. Reach the end with as many body parts as possible!
games.controls: Click or Space – Fire grappling hook | Hold – Maintain the rope connection | Release – Detach and fly freely
games.instructions: Release your rope early before hitting walls to redirect your swing safely. Build momentum through long swinging arcs and release at the peak to glide across large gaps.
games.creator: Hanger is created by A Small Game, an indie developer known for this beloved ragdoll physics swinging game and its sequel.

games.name: Head Soccer 2023
games.description: Head Soccer 2023 is a fast-paced arcade soccer game created by D&D Dream. Choose from a roster of big-headed characters, each with their own special power shot, and compete in one-on-one soccer duels. Score the most goals before time runs out to win!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move your character | Space – Kick / Activate special ability | Two-player mode uses separate key sets
games.instructions: Collect power-ups that appear on the field to gain speed or strength advantages. Save your special power shot for moments when the goalkeeper is out of position for the best chance to score.
games.creator: Head Soccer 2023 is created by D&D Dream, the Korean developer behind the popular Head Soccer franchise.

games.name: Infinite Soccer
games.description: Infinite Soccer is an endless goal-scoring challenge where you must fire the ball into the net over and over again with increasing difficulty. Keep your shot streak alive and see how many goals you can score before the challenge becomes too much!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your shot toward the goal | Click – Kick the ball | Arrow Keys – Adjust your player's position
games.instructions: Aim consistently for the corners of the net where goalkeepers have the least reach. Develop a reliable shooting routine and stay calm under pressure to build long goal streaks.
games.creator: Infinite Soccer is an independent browser sports game created by various indie developers.

games.name: Marbles Sorting
games.description: Marbles Sorting is a relaxing yet brain-teasing puzzle game created by Inlogic Software. Sort colorful marbles into tubes until every tube contains marbles of only one color. Sounds simple – but it gets beautifully tricky as levels progress!
games.controls: Mouse – Click a tube to pick up the top marble | Click another tube – Transfer the marble there if the color rules allow
games.instructions: Always keep one tube empty as a buffer to give yourself maneuvering room. Plan at least four to five moves ahead before making any move to avoid painting yourself into an unsolvable corner.
games.creator: Marbles Sorting is created by Inlogic Software, a developer with a strong catalog of satisfying color-sorting puzzle games on web and mobile.

games.name: Monkey Mart
games.description: Monkey Mart is an adorable supermarket management game created by TinyDobbins. Play as a hardworking monkey who must plant crops, stock shelves, and serve a growing stream of customers – all while expanding your store into a retail empire!
games.controls: WASD or Arrow Keys – Move your monkey around the store | Space – Interact with stations, harvest crops, and stock shelves
games.instructions: Upgrade your stations early to handle more customers without running around frantically. Hire worker monkeys as soon as you can – they automatically harvest and restock so you can focus on bigger expansions.
games.creator: Monkey Mart is created by TinyDobbins, the indie developer also behind Stick Merge, known for polished and charming idle management games.

games.name: Pou
games.description: Pou is a beloved virtual pet game created by Zakeh. Adopt your very own alien creature named Pou, then feed it, bathe it, and play mini-games to keep it healthy and happy. Earn coins to buy outfits, food, and potions to customize your companion!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to interact with Pou | Click – Feed, clean, and play with your pet | Drag – Apply accessories and food items
games.instructions: Check in on Pou regularly throughout the day – its hunger and happiness meters drop over time. Spend coins from mini-games on food and potions to level up Pou and unlock new customization options.
games.creator: Pou is created by Zakeh, the developer who launched this massively popular virtual pet game originally on mobile in 2012.

games.name: Roper
games.description: Roper is a physics-based platformer where you swing through challenging levels using a grappling rope. Fire your hook at surfaces, build momentum, and soar through the air collecting gems while avoiding deadly hazards on the way to the exit!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim and fire the grappling rope | Click – Attach rope to surfaces | Release Click – Let go and swing freely
games.instructions: Build up swinging momentum to fly across large gaps with ease. Use the rope to redirect your arc mid-swing and stick precise landings on small platforms.
games.creator: Roper is an independent browser physics platformer created by various indie developers.

games.name: Super Liquid Soccer
games.description: Super Liquid Soccer is a hilarious physics-based soccer game created by Shoe The Goose. Control a wobbly liquid blob player and try to score goals in chaotic matches where unpredictable physics rule everything. Perfectly ridiculous fun for 1v1 or vs CPU!
games.controls: Player 1: Arrow Keys – Move and jump | Player 2: WASD – Move and jump | Single player mode available vs CPU
games.instructions: Lean into the chaotic physics – unexpected bounces can create surprise scoring opportunities. Use your blob's weight and momentum to muscle opponents away from the ball and set up your shot.
games.creator: Super Liquid Soccer is created by Shoe The Goose, an indie developer known for charming and physics-driven sports games.

games.name: 1 On 1 Soccer
games.description: 1 On 1 Soccer is an intense head-to-head soccer game where two players go toe-to-toe on a compact pitch. Use speed, timing, and clever positioning to dribble past your opponent and slot the ball into the net. First to the target score wins!
games.controls: Player 1: Arrow Keys – Move | Up Arrow – Jump | Player 2: WASD – Move | W – Jump
games.instructions: Control the space between you and your opponent rather than chasing the ball recklessly. A well-timed jump header can score from seemingly impossible angles.
games.creator: 1 On 1 Soccer is a classic browser sports game originally developed for the Flash gaming era, now available in updated form.

games.name: 10 Is Again
games.description: 10 Is Again is a creative number puzzle game. Arrange and combine numbered tiles on the board so that groups of tiles sum to exactly 10. Simple arithmetic meets spatial thinking in this satisfying and increasingly complex brain teaser!
games.controls: Mouse – Click and drag tiles to move them | Click – Select and place number tiles on the grid
games.instructions: Look for multiple small numbers that can be grouped to reach 10 rather than relying on single large tiles. Think spatially – sometimes reorganizing the whole board unlocks a chain of valid 10-combinations.
games.creator: 10 Is Again is an independent browser puzzle game created by indie developers focused on number and logic games.

games.description: 2048 is an iconic sliding number puzzle created by Gabriele Cirulli. Slide tiles across a 4x4 grid to merge matching numbers and work your way up to the coveted 2048 tile – and beyond. One of the most addictive puzzle games ever made!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Slide all tiles in one direction | Matching number tiles merge when they collide
games.instructions: Keep your highest tile anchored in one corner at all times – never let it drift to the center. Build cascading chains of numbers from your corner outward so merges happen efficiently.
games.creator: 2048 is created by Gabriele Cirulli, an Italian developer who released it as an open-source project in 2014 – it went viral overnight.

games.name: Achievement Unlocked
games.description: Achievement Unlocked is a hilarious meta-platformer created by Armor Games. The entire point of the game is to unlock achievements – not to complete a traditional goal. Jump around, touch things, and do the unexpected to earn all 99 quirky achievements!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move your elephant | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Try everything – standing still, walking off edges, going backwards – many achievements reward unconventional behavior. Don't focus on any one goal; explore the whole level and achievements will pop naturally.
games.creator: Achievement Unlocked is created by Armor Games (developed by John Cooney), a satirical game that lovingly mocks achievement culture in video games.

games.name: Achievement Unlocked 2
games.description: Achievement Unlocked 2 is the bigger and funnier sequel created by Armor Games. With even more absurd achievements to discover and a more complex environment to explore, this meta-platformer delivers more laughs and more surprises than the original!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Revisit every area of the level multiple times – new achievements unlock as you complete others. Think creatively; some achievements require doing something at a precise moment or in a specific sequence.
games.creator: Achievement Unlocked 2 is created by Armor Games, the sequel to the beloved original meta-platformer that turned achievement hunting into the actual game.

games.name: Achievement Unlocked 6
games.description: Achievement Unlocked 6 is the latest entry in Armor Games' legendary meta-platformer series. More achievements, more secrets, and more delightfully absurd challenges await. If you thought the first game was clever, this one goes even further over the top!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Try every possible action in every room – achievements can trigger from the most unexpected interactions. Keep track of which achievements you're missing and think about what you haven't tried yet.
games.creator: Achievement Unlocked 6 is created by Armor Games, continuing their iconic series that celebrates and satirizes the achievement system in gaming.

games.name: Acid Bunny 2
games.description: Acid Bunny 2 is a dark and surreal platform adventure where a confused bunny must hunt down pieces of his missing brain after a very bad trip. Navigate bizarre psychedelic worlds, solve puzzles, and piece together the story in this twisted sequel!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move | Space – Jump | Mouse – Interact with objects in the environment
games.instructions: Explore every corner of each strange environment – key items are often hidden in unexpected places. Pay attention to the visual storytelling; clues about how to progress are woven into the surreal scenery.
games.creator: Acid Bunny 2 is created by GameFree.ca, a browser gaming developer known for this quirky and darkly humorous platformer series.

games.name: Age Of War 2
games.description: Age Of War 2 is an epic strategy game created by Max Games. Battle through the ages – from prehistoric cavemen to futuristic robots – by deploying units and unleashing special abilities to destroy your enemy's base before they destroy yours!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to deploy units and activate special abilities | Manage gold to recruit stronger warriors
games.instructions: Evolve to the next age as quickly as possible – advanced units dramatically outclass earlier ones. Balance spending between deploying units now and saving for age evolution upgrades.
games.creator: Age Of War 2 is created by Max Games, developers of this popular real-time strategy series that blends automatic combat with resource management.

games.name: American Football
games.description: American Football is an exciting gridiron sports game that puts you on the field for classic football action. Call plays, make passes, and drive the ball down the field to score touchdowns in this faithful recreation of America's favorite sport!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move your players | Space – Pass or kick the ball | Select plays using on-screen prompts
games.instructions: Mix running and passing plays to keep the defense off-balance. Study your opponent's defensive alignment before each snap to pick the play that exploits the open gaps.
games.creator: American Football is a browser sports game developed by independent game creators inspired by classic football arcade experiences.

games.name: Army Of Ages
games.description: Army Of Ages is a side-scrolling strategy game created by Max Games. Deploy soldiers from different historical and futuristic eras, manage your resources wisely, and push the battle line forward to destroy the enemy stronghold!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to spawn units | Number Keys – Activate special era abilities | Manage resources shown on the HUD
games.instructions: Mix unit types from different eras to cover each other's weaknesses. Invest in base upgrades between waves to increase your unit production speed and capacity.
games.creator: Army Of Ages is created by Max Games, a browser game studio known for blending real-time strategy with fun unit-deployment mechanics.

games.name: AZ Tank
games.description: AZ Tank is an action-packed tank battle game where you control an armored vehicle through challenging combat zones. Navigate enemy territory, dodge incoming fire, and blast your opponents into scrap metal in this classic tank warfare game!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move and aim your tank | Space – Fire cannon | Player 2: WASD – Move | S – Fire
games.instructions: Use walls and terrain as cover between shots to avoid taking damage. Lead your shots slightly ahead of moving enemies to compensate for the bullet travel time.
games.creator: AZ Tank is a classic browser tank battle game created by independent Flash game developers.

games.name: Backyard Baseball
games.description: Backyard Baseball is a fun and lighthearted baseball game where neighborhood kids take to the diamond for some serious fun. Draft your team from a colorful roster of kid characters and compete for backyard championship glory!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim pitches and control at-bat | Click – Pitch the ball | Space or Click – Swing the bat
games.instructions: Watch the pitcher's windup carefully to time your swing correctly. Mix up your pitch selection when pitching – alternating between fast and slow pitches keeps batters guessing.
games.creator: Backyard Baseball is based on the classic series originally created by Humongous Entertainment, adapted for browser play.

games.name: Basketball Stars
games.description: Basketball Stars is a slick 1v1 basketball game created by Miniclip. Dribble past defenders, launch three-pointers, and perform signature moves in fast-paced basketball duels. Unlock new star players with unique skills and dominate the court!
games.controls: WASD or Arrow Keys – Move your player | Space – Shoot / Block | Z or K – Steal | Mouse – Aim shots
games.instructions: Pump fake to draw your defender into the air before driving to the basket or shooting. Time your blocks precisely – jumping too early leaves you flat-footed when the real shot goes up.
games.creator: Basketball Stars is created by Miniclip, one of the world's leading online game developers known for sports and competitive browser games.

games.name: Billiards
games.description: Billiards is a classic pool simulation game that brings the full billiards experience to your browser. Aim carefully, control your cue power, and pot balls with precision while setting up your next shot. A timeless game of skill and strategy!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your cue stick | Click and Drag – Set shot power | Release – Strike the cue ball
games.instructions: Always plan your next shot while setting up the current one – potting a ball in a bad position can leave you snookered. Use light touch on power when precision matters more than force.
games.creator: Billiards is a browser pool game developed by independent game studios bringing classic billiards simulation to online play.

games.name: Black Knight
games.description: Black Knight is a dark medieval action game where you play as an armored knight fighting through hordes of enemies. Slash, block, and battle your way through increasingly difficult waves of foes to prove your worth as the ultimate Black Knight!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move | Z / J – Attack | X / K – Block | Space – Special ability
games.instructions: Master the block timing to parry enemy attacks and create openings for your counterstrikes. Defeat tougher enemies first to reduce incoming pressure before mopping up smaller foes.
games.creator: Black Knight is a browser action game created by independent Flash developers in the medieval combat game genre.

games.name: Black Navy War 2
games.description: Black Navy War 2 is an intense naval strategy game available on Kongregate. Command your fleet, deploy ships and submarines, and launch aerial strikes to sink the enemy navy before they destroy yours. Strategic deployment is the key to victory on the high seas!
games.controls: Mouse – Select and deploy ships and aircraft | Click – Activate unit attacks and special strikes
games.instructions: Balance your fleet between surface ships and submarines – each counters different enemy unit types. Launch aerial strikes at enemy command units to disrupt their deployment rhythm.
games.creator: Black Navy War 2 is a browser naval strategy game published on Kongregate, featuring deep strategic naval combat gameplay.

games.name: Blockblast
games.description: Blockblast is an addictive block-placing puzzle game created by Hungry Studio. Drop Tetris-style blocks onto the grid to complete full rows and columns that clear automatically. No time pressure – just pure spatial thinking and satisfying combos!
games.controls: Mouse – Drag block pieces onto the grid | Place pieces to fill complete rows or columns
games.instructions: Think two to three moves ahead before placing any piece – a misplaced block can permanently block your progress. Create simultaneous row and column clears for big score multipliers.
games.creator: Blockblast is created by Hungry Studio, developers of this popular block-placement puzzle game enjoyed by millions on mobile and web.

games.name: Blood And Thunder
games.description: Blood And Thunder is a brutal action strategy game set in a world of relentless combat. Lead your warriors into battle, manage resources on the fly, and unleash devastating abilities to crush the enemy forces before they overwhelm you!
games.controls: Mouse – Select and command units | Click – Deploy forces and activate combat abilities | Manage resources shown on screen
games.instructions: Coordinate different unit types together – melee warriors protect your ranged attackers while they deal damage safely. Conserve your most powerful abilities for emergency situations rather than burning them early.
games.creator: Blood And Thunder is a browser action-strategy game developed by independent Flash game creators.

games.name: Bloomin Gardens
games.description: Bloomin Gardens is a charming match-3 puzzle game where you tend to a colorful garden by matching blooming flowers. Clear the board by connecting groups of matching flowers and work through increasingly complex garden layouts!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on groups of matching flowers to remove them | Click – Select adjacent matching tiles
games.instructions: Target larger clusters of matching flowers first to maximize the tiles cleared per move. Look for chain reactions where removing one group causes others to fall into matching positions.
games.creator: Bloomin Gardens is a browser puzzle game published through CrazyGames, featuring relaxing garden-themed match gameplay.

games.name: Bloons Tower Defense 4
games.description: Bloons Tower Defense 4 is a beloved strategy game created by Ninja Kiwi. Strategically place monkey towers along winding paths to pop waves of colorful bloons before they reach the exit. Upgrade your towers, unlock special abilities, and stop the dreaded MOAB-class bloons!
games.controls: Mouse – Select and place monkey towers on the map | Click – Upgrade towers and activate special abilities
games.instructions: Save money for key upgrades rather than placing too many weak towers. Combine tower types strategically to handle fast bloons, camouflaged bloons, and massive MOAB-class enemies.
games.creator: Bloons Tower Defense 4 is created by Ninja Kiwi, a New Zealand-based studio famous for the beloved and long-running Bloons franchise.

games.name: Bloxorz
games.description: Bloxorz is a legendary minimalist puzzle game created by Damien Clarke. Roll a rectangular block across a suspended platform and maneuver it upright over the hole at the end of each stage – without falling off the edge. Deceptively simple, endlessly challenging!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Roll the block in any direction | Navigate all 33 stages by getting the block into the hole
games.instructions: Think several moves ahead before rolling – falling off the edge resets the entire stage. Learn the special tiles: cross-shaped switches and split switches completely change your routing options.
games.creator: Bloxorz is created by Damien Clarke and published by Miniclip, becoming one of the most iconic and widely played browser puzzle games ever made.

games.name: Bowman 2
games.description: Bowman 2 is a classic archery shooting game where you face off against an opponent in a deadly arrow duel. Adjust your angle and pull strength carefully to arc your arrows through the wind and eliminate your opponent before they get you!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your bow | Click and Hold – Pull back for power | Release – Fire your arrow
games.instructions: Account for gravity and distance – arrows arc significantly over long ranges. Study your previous shots and adjust angle and power incrementally rather than making large corrections.
games.creator: Bowman 2 is a classic browser archery game created by IceTeaGames, one of the most iconic skill-shot games of the Flash gaming era.

games.name: Bowmaster
games.description: Bowmaster is an epic archery defense game where you protect your castle from waves of invading enemies. Draw your bow, aim carefully, and fire arrows to pick off soldiers, horses, and siege weapons before they breach your walls!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your bow | Click and Hold – Draw back for shot power | Release – Fire | Choose different arrow types from the menu
games.instructions: Prioritize siege weapons and catapults – they deal the most damage to your castle walls if left unchecked. Use fire arrows on clustered groups of infantry for area damage.
games.creator: Bowmaster is a browser archery defense game developed by independent Flash game creators in the castle defense genre.

games.name: Boxhead More Rooms
games.description: Boxhead More Rooms is a top-down zombie shooter created by Sean Cooper. Blast through room after room of increasingly dense zombie hordes using an arsenal of weapons from pistols to rocket launchers. The more kills you chain, the more powerful your weapons become!
games.controls: WASD – Move | Arrow Keys – Aim and shoot | 1–9 – Switch between weapons
games.instructions: Build your kill multiplier by chaining kills rapidly to unlock faster and more powerful weapon upgrades. Use barrels and explosives placed around rooms to deal area damage to clustered zombie groups.
games.creator: Boxhead More Rooms is created by Sean Cooper, developer of the popular Boxhead zombie shooter series known for its satisfying room-clearing gameplay.

games.name: Cannon Basketball 2
games.description: Cannon Basketball 2 is a creative physics puzzle game where you fire basketballs from a cannon into hoops. Adjust your cannon angle and timing to bounce balls off surfaces, triggers, and moving obstacles to sink every shot!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim the cannon | Click – Fire the basketball | Adjust angle before each shot
games.instructions: Use walls and surfaces strategically to ricochet balls into hard-to-reach hoops. Trigger moving platforms and switches in the correct sequence to create a clear path to the basket.
games.creator: Cannon Basketball 2 is a browser physics puzzle game developed by independent Flash game creators in the basketball puzzle genre.

games.name: Catch The Candy
games.description: Catch The Candy is an adorable physics puzzle game where a cute creature extends a sticky arm to grab candy hanging from various positions. Swing, stretch, and latch on to pull the candy into your mouth in each clever puzzle level!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to launch your sticky arm toward a target | Use platforms and surfaces as anchor points
games.instructions: Swing in an arc to build momentum before grabbing the candy to reach distant positions. Plan your anchor points so each grab swings you progressively closer to the candy.
games.creator: Catch The Candy is a browser physics puzzle game created by Elefantopia, known for this charming and creative stretchy-arm puzzle series.

games.name: Chibi Knight
games.description: Chibi Knight is a charming action RPG created by Kevin Gu. Control an adorable tiny knight on a big adventure through a colorful world filled with monsters, dungeons, and boss battles. Level up, learn magic spells, and save the world in pint-sized style!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Move | Z / J – Attack | X / K – Use magic spell | Defeat enemies to gain experience and level up
games.instructions: Grind experience by fighting enemies before tackling boss battles – higher levels make a huge difference. Experiment with all the magic spells you unlock to find which ones work best against each boss type.
games.creator: Chibi Knight is created by Kevin Gu, an indie developer who crafted this beloved compact action RPG celebrated for its cute art style and satisfying combat.

games.name: Dead Zed
games.description: Dead Zed is an intense first-person zombie defense game. Waves of the undead charge toward your position and you must shoot them down before they reach you. Send survivors on search missions during the day to find supplies and reinforcements!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your weapon | Left Click – Shoot | R – Reload | 1–4 – Switch weapons | Send survivors on missions using the menu
games.instructions: Always reload during breaks between zombie waves rather than mid-attack. Prioritize sending survivors on mission to find better weapons and ammo caches to upgrade your defense.
games.creator: Dead Zed is a browser zombie defense game created by 3RD Sense, developers known for their polished first-person shooter games.

games.name: Deeper Sleep
games.description: Deeper Sleep is a chilling atmospheric horror adventure created by scriptwelder. Trapped in a strange dream world, you must explore dark environments, solve puzzles, and uncover the terrifying truth while avoiding the monstrous Shadow. This is the thrilling sequel to Deep Sleep!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to move and interact with the environment | Explore your surroundings to collect and use items
games.instructions: Save your progress regularly – dangerous encounters can appear without warning. Examine every item in your inventory carefully; many puzzles require combining or using objects in non-obvious ways.
games.creator: Deeper Sleep is created by scriptwelder (Paweł Karwowski), a Polish indie developer famous for his atmospheric horror point-and-click series.

games.name: Dig To China
games.description: Dig To China is an addictive idle digging game where you tunnel deep into the earth hunting for gems and resources. Upgrade your drill, hire miners, and dig as deep as possible on your epic quest to reach the other side of the world!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to dig and collect resources | Spend earnings on upgrades and new miners from the shop
games.instructions: Upgrade your drill speed and fuel capacity first – faster digging and longer trips mean more resources per run. Hire additional miners to dig multiple shafts simultaneously for maximum efficiency.
games.creator: Dig To China is a browser idle mining game created by independent Flash game developers.

games.name: Dino Run
games.description: Dino Run is a thrilling pixel-art running game created by Pixeljam. Play as a small dinosaur racing at full speed to outrun the apocalyptic wall of doom chasing you across a prehistoric landscape. Collect eggs, dodge obstacles, and survive the extinction event!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Run and jump | Down Arrow – Duck | Z or Up Arrow – Super jump
games.instructions: Collect power mushrooms scattered along the path to boost your speed when the doom wall gets too close. Enter burrows in the ground to dodge hazard-heavy sections of the surface path.
games.creator: Dino Run is created by Pixeljam, an indie game studio known for charming pixel-art games with a strong environmental message woven into the gameplay.

games.name: Dont Escape
games.description: Dont Escape is a clever point-and-click puzzle game created by scriptwelder with a unique twist – instead of escaping, you play as a werewolf who must lock himself inside a cabin before nightfall to protect others from himself. Prepare wisely before the moon rises!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on objects and areas to interact | Use and combine items from your inventory to barricade the cabin
games.instructions: Explore the entire area before nightfall and collect every item you find – you'll need all of them. Prioritize the most critical barricades first to ensure nothing can break through when you transform.
games.creator: Dont Escape is created by scriptwelder (Paweł Karwowski), who ingeniously flipped the escape room genre on its head with this beloved puzzle game.

games.name: Dont Escape 2
games.description: Dont Escape 2 is the post-apocalyptic sequel created by scriptwelder. Stranded in a zombie-infested world, you must fortify a house before night falls and the undead come for you. Scavenge for supplies, board up windows, and survive until dawn!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to move, explore, and interact with objects | Gather items and build barricades before nightfall
games.instructions: Scout the full map during the day to find all available resources before spending time on barricades. Choose which fortifications to prioritize based on the number of breach points you can realistically cover.
games.creator: Dont Escape 2 is created by scriptwelder, continuing his unique reverse escape room series with a tense zombie survival setting.

games.name: Dont Escape 3
games.description: Dont Escape 3 takes the series into outer space! Stranded on a damaged spaceship with a deadly alien aboard, you must trap the creature and survive a catastrophic solar storm. Explore the vessel, gather materials, and prepare your trap before time runs out!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to move through the ship and interact with objects | Combine items from your inventory to set traps
games.instructions: Map out the entire ship before committing to any trap design – you need to know every available resource. The alien's behavior patterns give clues about which areas it frequents most.
games.creator: Dont Escape 3 is created by scriptwelder, masterfully adapting his reverse escape room concept to a terrifying sci-fi horror setting.

games.name: Duck Life
games.description: Duck Life is an adorable duck training and racing game created by Wix Games. Train your little duckling in running, swimming, and flying to build up its stats, then enter races to win coins and upgrade your farm after a tornado destroys everything!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Navigate training mini-games | Spacebar – Jump in running training | Follow on-screen prompts for each discipline
games.instructions: Balance training across all three skills – neglecting any one discipline will hurt your overall race performance. Spend coins on seeds to feed your duck and maintain its energy for longer training sessions.
games.creator: Duck Life is created by Wix Games, the developer behind this beloved duck racing series that became one of the most popular Flash games ever made.

games.name: Duck Life 2
games.description: Duck Life 2 is the exciting sequel created by Wix Games. Train your duckling across more disciplines, explore new race locations, and compete in tougher tournaments. With more mini-games and deeper progression, it's even more addictive than the original!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Control your duck in training mini-games | Follow on-screen prompts for each skill challenge
games.instructions: Identify which skill each upcoming race values most and focus your training sessions there. The climbing skill introduced in this sequel is especially important for mountain terrain races.
games.creator: Duck Life 2 is created by Wix Games, continuing the wildly popular Duck Life series with expanded content and new race environments.

games.name: Duck Life 3 Game
games.description: Duck Life 3 introduces duck evolution! Created by Wix Games, this entry lets your duck evolve through different forms – Fire, Ice, Earth, and Plant – each with unique stat bonuses and visual styles. Train hard, evolve strategically, and claim the championship!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Control your duck through each training mini-game | Use evolution forms from the menu to change your duck's type
games.instructions: Choose your evolution type based on the terrain of the upcoming races. Each evolution offers different stat bonuses that can give you a decisive edge in the right race conditions.
games.creator: Duck Life 3 is created by Wix Games, introducing the evolution mechanic that added exciting new strategic depth to the beloved training series.

games.name: Duck Life 4
games.description: Duck Life 4 is the action-packed fourth installment created by Wix Games. Fight other ducks in addition to racing them! Train your duck in combat skills alongside the classic disciplines, battle wild ducks in the open world, and become the ultimate duck champion!
games.controls: Arrow Keys or WASD – Control your duck in training and combat | Z – Attack in duck fights | Navigate the open world to find races and wild ducks
games.instructions: Level up your fighting skills alongside racing stats – tougher world areas require combat ability to unlock. Explore the whole map to find hidden trainers and secret race locations.
games.creator: Duck Life 4 is created by Wix Games, expanding the Duck Life formula with RPG-style open world exploration and combat elements.

games.name: Electric Man 2
games.description: Electric Man 2 is a spectacular stickman fighting game created by DX Interactive. Harness the power of electricity and battle through a brutal tournament using lightning-fast combos, charged attacks, and slow-motion finishing moves. Style counts as much as victory!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move | A – Punch | S – Kick | D – Grab | Hold button – Charge slow-motion attack | Combine inputs for devastating combos
games.instructions: Master the slow-motion mechanic – holding attack buttons charges electric moves that deal massive damage and look incredible. Grab enemies and throw them into each other to deal damage to multiple opponents at once.
games.creator: Electric Man 2 is created by DX Interactive (Damien Clarke), delivering one of the most visually impressive and satisfying stickman fighting games ever made.

games.name: Endless War 4
games.description: Endless War 4 is a gritty WW2 action game created by Endless War Team. Fight through intense battlefield scenarios as a soldier armed with period-accurate weapons. Survive brutal firefights, complete mission objectives, and prove yourself on the front lines!
games.controls: WASD – Move | Mouse – Aim | Left Click – Shoot | R – Reload | G – Throw grenade | 1–4 – Switch weapons
games.instructions: Use cover constantly – staying exposed in the open is lethal even briefly. Prioritize enemies with machine guns and heavy weapons first as they can quickly cut through your health.
games.creator: Endless War 4 is created by Endless War Team, developers of this popular WW2 action shooter series known for its tough and realistic combat scenarios.

games.name: Escape The Closet
games.description: Escape The Closet is a clever point-and-click puzzle game where you wake up locked inside a dark closet with no memory of how you got there. Examine your surroundings, find hidden objects, and use your wits to solve the puzzles and get out!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on objects to examine and interact | Collect and combine items from your inventory to solve puzzles
games.instructions: Click on every inch of the environment – important items are often hidden in dark corners or unexpected places. Try combining inventory items with each other when individual items don't seem to do anything.
games.creator: Escape The Closet is a browser escape room puzzle game created by independent point-and-click adventure developers.

games.name: Factory Balls 2
games.description: Factory Balls 2 is a brilliant creative puzzle game created by Bart Bonte. Each level shows you a target ball design and you must figure out the correct sequence of factory tools – paints, masks, hats, and belts – to reproduce it exactly. Logic meets creativity!
games.controls: Mouse – Drag the white ball over factory tools in the correct sequence | Match the target design shown in the corner
games.instructions: Study the target ball carefully and work backwards to figure out which step must have come last. Masking tools are key – they protect areas from paint so you can layer colors precisely.
games.creator: Factory Balls 2 is created by Bart Bonte, a Belgian indie developer celebrated for elegant and original puzzle game designs.

games.name: Feed Us 2
games.description: Feed Us 2 is a darkly fun action game where you control a carnivorous piranha hunting human swimmers for blood. Satisfy your hunger quota by attacking swimmers in the water, upgrading your piranha with more terrifying abilities as you progress!
games.controls: Mouse – Move your piranha | Left Click – Bite and attack swimmers | Collect blood to fill the quota and unlock upgrades
games.instructions: Target isolated swimmers first before going after groups to avoid getting stunned by their splashing. Upgrade speed and damage early to take down tougher targets before they can escape to safety.
games.creator: Feed Us 2 is created by Igiari, the developer behind this darkly humorous piranha feeding game series.

games.name: Feed Us Pirates
games.description: Feed Us Pirates is the nautical-themed installment of the Feed Us series by Igiari. Your hungry piranha now hunts pirates who have invaded the seas! Attack pirate ships, feast on their crew members, and upgrade your deadly fish to become an unstoppable ocean predator!
games.controls: Mouse – Control your piranha's movement | Left Click – Bite and attack pirates | Collect blood to meet level goals and buy upgrades
games.instructions: Board pirate ships from below by jumping out of the water to catch crew members on deck. Prioritize upgrading your bite power early to take down armored pirates more efficiently.
games.creator: Feed Us Pirates is created by Igiari, expanding their popular Feed Us series with a fun pirate-hunting theme and new environmental hazards.

games.name: Fireboy And Watergirl 2
games.description: Fireboy And Watergirl 2: The Light Temple is a cooperative puzzle platformer created by Oslo Albet. Control both fire and water elemental characters simultaneously – or play with a friend – to activate switches, avoid elemental hazards, and collect gems!
games.controls: Fireboy: Arrow Keys – Move and jump | Watergirl: WASD – Move and jump | Both characters must reach their colored exit doors
games.instructions: Remember the rules: Fireboy dies in water and Watergirl dies in fire – keep each character in their safe zones. Coordinate both characters to activate pressure plates that unlock doors and create platforms for each other.
games.creator: Fireboy And Watergirl 2 is created by Oslo Albet, developer of the beloved cooperative platformer series enjoyed by millions of players worldwide.

games.name: FL Tron
games.description: FL Tron is a fast-paced light cycle arena game inspired by the classic Tron movie. Race your light bike across the grid, leaving an indestructible light trail behind you. Force opponents to crash into your trail while avoiding theirs – last bike standing wins!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Steer your light cycle | Navigate the arena without crossing any trail
games.instructions: Drive in tight spiral patterns to trap opponents in shrinking spaces they cannot escape. Cut across the arena diagonally to cut off opponents' escape routes before they can react.
games.creator: FL Tron is a browser light cycle game created by independent Flash developers inspired by the iconic Tron arcade and film franchise.

games.name: Flood Runner 4
games.description: Flood Runner 4 is an epic endless runner created by Unhuman. Sprint across crumbling platforms while a massive wall of flood water, lava, and explosions chases you from behind. Leap across gaps, collect power-ups, and survive the apocalyptic chaos as long as possible!
games.controls: Space or Up Arrow – Jump | Double press – Double jump | Duck at the right moment to avoid obstacles
games.instructions: Always keep your eye on what is ahead rather than the flood behind you – reacting to obstacles early is crucial. Save double jumps for crossing the widest gaps rather than wasting them on small ones.
games.creator: Flood Runner 4 is created by Unhuman, developer of this intense and visually spectacular endless survival running series.

games.name: Football 1 On 1
games.description: Football 1 On 1 is an intense one-on-one American football showdown. Face off against a single defender and use your running and juking skills to reach the end zone for a touchdown. Read your opponent's movements and make your move at the right moment!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Move your ball carrier | Juke left and right to evade the defender | Reach the end zone to score
games.instructions: Fake one direction before cutting the other way to wrong-foot the defender. Wait for the defender to commit to a side before making your decisive cut toward the open end zone.
games.creator: Football 1 On 1 is a browser American football game developed by independent Flash game creators.

games.name: Gunblood
games.description: Gunblood is a tense Wild West dueling game created by Wolf Games. Face off against increasingly deadly gunslingers in high-noon quickdraw showdowns. Draw your pistol faster than your opponent and aim true – it's kill or be killed on the frontier!
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your pistol | Left Click – Fire when the duel starts | Wait for the signal before drawing
games.instructions: Keep your mouse pre-aimed at your opponent's body before the signal to minimize aiming time. Breathe steady – flinching and shooting before the signal counts as a penalty.
games.creator: Gunblood is created by Wolf Games, developers of this iconic and deeply satisfying Wild West quickdraw dueling game.

games.name: Handless Millionaire
games.description: Handless Millionaire is a nerve-shredding reflex game where you must snatch cash from beneath a descending guillotine without getting your hand chopped off. The prize money increases with each successful grab – but one mistake costs you a hand!
games.controls: Mouse – Move your hand into position | Click and Hold – Reach in to grab the money | Release – Yank your hand back before the blade falls
games.instructions: Study the rhythm of the guillotine blade carefully before reaching in for the first time. As the cash prizes grow larger, the blade speed increases – adjust your timing accordingly.
games.creator: Handless Millionaire is a browser reflex game created by independent Flash game developers in the darkly comedic reflex game genre.

games.name: Happy Wheels
games.description: Happy Wheels is an outrageously brutal physics ragdoll game created by Jim Bonacci. Choose a character and vehicle, then navigate impossibly dangerous obstacle courses. Limbs will be lost, blood will be spilled, but the goal is always to reach the finish – somehow!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Accelerate, brake, and lean | Space – Special action depending on your character | Z – Eject from vehicle | Ctrl – Brake
games.instructions: Maintain steady speed rather than flooring the throttle on trap-heavy sections – going too fast is usually fatal. When you lose a limb, you can often still complete levels by crawling or using your vehicle differently.
games.creator: Happy Wheels is created by Jim Bonacci, the American developer who spent years building this iconic and gleefully gory physics game.

games.name: Home Sheep Home
games.description: Home Sheep Home is a cooperative puzzle game featuring the Shaun the Sheep characters created by Aardman Animations. Guide Shaun, Timmy, and Shirley through clever platforming puzzles using each sheep's unique size and weight to overcome obstacles and get everyone home safely!
games.controls: 1 / 2 / 3 – Switch between Shaun, Timmy, and Shirley | Arrow Keys or WASD – Move selected sheep | Space – Jump
games.instructions: Use each sheep's physical properties cleverly – big Shirley can press heavy platforms, tiny Timmy can fit through small gaps, and Shaun is the most agile jumper. Think about which sheep needs to go where before moving any of them.
games.creator: Home Sheep Home is created in collaboration with Aardman Animations, the creators of the beloved Wallace & Gromit and Shaun the Sheep franchises.

games.name: Kill Time In The Office
games.description: Kill Time In The Office is a fun sandbox game where you secretly goof off at work without getting caught by your boss. Click on objects to play secret mini-games, browse the internet, and find clever ways to waste the entire work day while appearing productive!
games.controls: Mouse – Click on objects to interact and discover hidden activities | Watch out for the boss and stop goofing off when he walks by
games.instructions: Keep one eye on your boss's position at all times – immediately switch to looking busy when he approaches your area. Explore every object in the office to discover all the hidden time-wasting activities.
games.creator: Kill Time In The Office is a browser sandbox game created by independent Flash developers in the office simulator genre.

games.name: Kingdom Rush
games.description: Kingdom Rush is one of the greatest tower defense games ever made, created by Ironhide Game Studio. Place archer towers, artillery, barracks, and mage towers along enemy paths to defend your kingdom from waves of fantastical creatures and powerful boss monsters!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to place and upgrade towers | Click – Summon reinforcement soldiers | Activate hero and tower special abilities
games.instructions: Always maintain at least one barracks tower to create chokepoints that slow enemy advancement. Upgrade existing towers rather than buying new cheap ones – a fully upgraded tower vastly outperforms multiple weak ones.
games.creator: Kingdom Rush is created by Ironhide Game Studio, a Uruguayan developer whose tower defense masterpiece spawned a celebrated franchise.

games.name: Learn To Fly
games.description: Learn To Fly is a hilarious penguin flight game created by Light Bringer Games. A determined penguin refuses to believe that penguins can't fly! Launch yourself off a ramp, glide as far as possible, and use your earnings to upgrade your glider, rocket, and launch ramp!
games.controls: Left / Right Arrow Keys – Tilt your penguin mid-air | Space – Activate rocket boost | Upgrade between launches from the shop
games.instructions: Tilt your penguin to maintain the optimal glide angle and maximize horizontal distance on each flight. Buy ramp upgrades first – a higher launch gives you more airtime to work with for all subsequent upgrades.
games.creator: Learn To Fly is created by Light Bringer Games, developer of this beloved incremental flight game series starring an endearingly determined penguin.

games.name: Learn To Fly 2
games.description: Learn To Fly 2 is the bigger and bolder sequel created by Light Bringer Games. Now your penguin must reach the sky and break through a wall of ice to prove the haters wrong! With more launch types, gliders, and payload options, the aerial adventure is grander than ever!
games.controls: Arrow Keys – Tilt your penguin during flight | Space – Activate boost | Shop between launches to buy and upgrade equipment
games.instructions: Experiment with different glider and boost combinations to find the setup that matches your play style. Focus upgrade spending on whichever equipment stage gives you the biggest distance-per-dollar improvement.
games.creator: Learn To Fly 2 is created by Light Bringer Games, expanding the penguin flight series with more equipment options and a new goal of breaking through the sky.

games.name: Learn To Fly 3
games.description: Learn To Fly 3 takes the penguin to space! Created by Light Bringer Games, this entry features an entirely new 3D rocket-building system where you design custom spacecraft to blast through the atmosphere. Complete story mode or tackle bonus challenges with your custom rocket!
games.controls: Build your rocket using the component interface | Arrow Keys – Control direction during launch | Space – Activate stages and boosters
games.instructions: Design balanced rockets that generate enough thrust without becoming too heavy to reach orbit. Complete story missions to unlock rare components that dramatically improve your rocket's performance.
games.creator: Learn To Fly 3 is created by Light Bringer Games, evolving their penguin series into a full rocket-building space adventure with deep crafting mechanics.

games.name: Mad Arrow
games.description: Mad Arrow is an intense archery challenge where you must hit increasingly difficult targets with your arrows. Account for wind, distance, and target movement to land every shot. How many perfect bulls-eyes can you score before running out of arrows?
games.controls: Mouse – Aim your bow | Click and Hold – Pull back for shot power | Release – Fire the arrow
games.instructions: Watch the wind indicator carefully and aim slightly upwind to compensate for drift on long shots. Study each target's movement pattern before shooting to predict where it will be when your arrow arrives.
games.creator: Mad Arrow is a browser archery skill game created by independent Flash game developers.

games.name: Madness Nexus
games.description: Madness Nexus is a brutal stick figure combat game set in the iconic Madness Combat universe created by Krinkels. Fight through hordes of agents and soldiers using guns, melee weapons, and pure combat skill. Fast, violent, and endlessly entertaining!
games.controls: WASD – Move | Mouse – Aim | Left Click – Attack or shoot | Right Click – Block | E – Pick up weapons
games.instructions: Constantly grab weapons from fallen enemies to keep yourself armed – running out of ammo mid-fight is dangerous. Use environmental objects like doors as improvised weapons and shields.
games.creator: Madness Nexus is created in the Madness Combat universe by Krinkels, the animator whose iconic stick figure action series became a Flash animation phenomenon.

games.name: Miragine War
games.description: Miragine War is a fantasy real-time strategy game where two armies clash on an epic battlefield. Deploy warriors, mages, and monsters along three lanes, manage your mana resources wisely, and push through the enemy lines to destroy their stronghold!
games.controls: Mouse – Click unit portraits to deploy them on the battlefield | Manage mana shown on screen | Deploy units across three combat lanes
games.instructions: Distribute your forces across all three lanes to prevent the enemy from breaking through on undefended flanks. Save mana for your most powerful units when the enemy sends a major push.
games.creator: Miragine War is created by Magitec, a developer known for this epic fantasy real-time strategy browser game.

games.name: Murder
games.description: Murder is a darkly comedic stealth puzzle game created by Blyts. You play as a hitman who must eliminate specific targets in each scene without being seen by witnesses. Observe the scene carefully, find the right moment, and eliminate your target without leaving evidence!
games.controls: Mouse – Click to interact with objects and move your character | Time your actions to avoid being witnessed by bystanders
games.instructions: Study every witness's movement pattern before taking action – a single witness destroys your cover. Look for environmental objects you can manipulate to create distractions or isolate your target.
games.creator: Murder is created by Blyts, an indie developer known for this cleverly designed stealth puzzle game series.

games.name: Mutilate A Doll
games.description: Mutilate A Doll is a physics sandbox game created by 0x72. Spawn a ragdoll figure and go absolutely wild with an enormous arsenal of weapons, tools, and special items. It's a physics playground with no objectives – just pure creative destructive fun!
games.controls: Mouse – Interact with the doll and environment | Left Click – Use selected tool or weapon | Right Click – Open context menu | Browse the menu to select weapons and items
games.instructions: Experiment freely with different weapon combinations to discover entertaining chain reactions. Use the freeze and pin tools to position the doll in specific poses before unleashing chaos for more creative results.
